name: codonopsis pilosula
title: codonopsis pilosula benefits
description: Codonopsis pilosula improves cognitive function by enhancing memory, attention, and mental clarity, which are crucial aspects of cognitive function that enable us to process information, learn new skills, and make informed decisions.
